O0350_COVID_VCNTN_CRNT_SW O0350_COVID_VCNTN_CRNT_SW O0350 - COVID-19 Vaccination Up To Date CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's COVID-19 vacciantion is up to date. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
626 A1400A_MDCR_FFS_PYR_SW A1400A_MDCR_FFS_PYR_SW A1400A - Payer: Medicare (FFS) CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Medicare (FFS). 0 = No 
1 = Yes
627 A1400B_MDCR_OPYR_SW A1400B_MDCR_OPYR_SW A1400B - Payer: Medicare (Managed Care/Part C/Medicare Advantage.) CHAR 1 This
